grid_system.ad_feed: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

buttons.default: h-12 px-6 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95

cards.listing: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 hover:border-white/10 transition-all duration-500 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-blue-900/10
cards.boosted: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-fuchsia-500/30 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(217,70,239,0.15)]

inputs.default: bg-[#121212] border-white/10 focus:border-blue-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500/50 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-slate-600

gradients.text_gradient: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-200 to-slate-400

general: Implement a 'Midnight' dark theme by default. Do not use pure black #000000, use #050505.
Use 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Import them from Google Fonts.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
Use Shadcn UI components but override their styles to match the 'Midnight & Neon' aesthetic defined in `colors`.
For the 'Escort' category, use the 'accent_pink' color (#D946EF) for badges and boost indicators.
For the 'Real Estate' category, use 'accent_green' (#10B981) for price tags.
The 'Boost' feature (Pay to appear first) must visually distinguish the card with a glowing border or a 'Featured' badge.
Rotating banners must have a smooth transition (fade or slide) and change every 4-5 seconds.

specific_pages.home: Implement a Bento Grid layout for categories. Use a full-width rotating banner at the top.
specific_pages.create_ad: Multi-step form with clear progress indicators. Step 1: Category, Step 2: Details, Step 3: Photos, Step 4: Payment.
specific_pages.ad_detail: Large hero image gallery. 'Contact' button must be sticky on mobile.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for headers and floating elements.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
